title: Sample: default settings
summary: Run 4 chains × 1000 draws with default priors.
oce_text:
[["hb-stan::sample"]]
data = "./data/hb_data.json"
run_dir = "./runs/hb_stan"
num_samples = 1000
num_warmup = 500
num_chains = 4
seed = 42

title: Sample: quick test
summary: Single chain, 250 draws — for testing data and model setup.
oce_text:
[["hb-stan::sample"]]
data = "./data/hb_data.json"
run_dir = "./runs/hb_stan_quick"
num_samples = 250
num_warmup = 250
num_chains = 1
seed = 1
